blocks.text: The wolves’ trap was too obvious. This is their business: feeding you with promises, and then eating you up. Those who decide to stay with the wolves will surely die. Such a fate is not for me. And we’ll see what happens next. My agility and business skills have saved me from all kinds of shit, even worse than these wolf traps.

I have found something: it's some kind of magical artifact. I’ve seen things like this before. They protect you from death. Some people need life, but I need money. Let's strike a deal. I'm only asking you for 0.6 ETH. Not a big deal if we're speaking about life, right?

I like to blow everything up. That is my passion. But most of all, I like to blow up parties. I like to party hard. All the chicks love me. My moves are sick. Although the wolves are known for how boring their parties are, they always supply great booze and food. But we decided to refuse it. I do not know what's wrong with those guys, maybe they're still partying, or maybe they're dead. And honestly, I do not know which of these options is better.

I had a revelation last night. I saw a desert full of hatred and death. I saw the end, but did not see the beginning, like a snake that bites its tail. I saw things that smelled of death. It was a sign. And then I saw evil, which captivated the hearts of my friends in real life. I wanted to save them, but evil is a fog for the mind: once you inhale it, there's no way back. They became victims of their pain and their sins. I know that not everyone can be saved, but why not try?
Son, you can become a hero and help the tokens be saved. There is a sand storm coming. Go forward and find a shelter for all of us!
Do not miss this opportunity and remember that heroes survive. Well, almost always.
